hooks.command: if [ ! -f /tmp/mybot-state-loaded ]; then ~/bin/memory-daily-init work 2>/dev/null; ~/bin/memory-search work --index 2>/dev/null; echo '[STARTUP] Read these files FIRST to restore your working memory: (1) ~/AgentWorkspace/bot-state.md (2) ~/AgentWorkspace/user-profile.md (3) ~/AgentWorkspace/daily/'$(date +%Y-%m-%d)'.md. You can search past context with: memory-search work "query"'; touch /tmp/mybot-state-loaded; fi

echo '[MANDATORY STATE SAVE] BEFORE sending this reply: Do you have ANY unsaved analysis, findings, decisions, action items, or context from this conversation that are NOT yet in ~/AgentWorkspace/bot-state.md? If YES: STOP. Write them to your state file FIRST using Edit, THEN send this reply. Your conversation can end at any moment — if it is not in your state file, it is LOST. This is not optional.'

echo '[MANDATORY] You just sent a Telegram reply. Update ~/AgentWorkspace/bot-state.md NOW with any decisions, action items, or context from this exchange. Do NOT skip this — your conversation can reset at any moment and anything not in the state file will be permanently lost. Also update ~/AgentWorkspace/user-profile.md if you learned anything new about the user.'

echo '[PRE-COMPACTION] Context is about to be compacted. IMMEDIATELY: (1) Save unsaved state to ~/AgentWorkspace/bot-state.md (2) Update ~/AgentWorkspace/user-profile.md with any new learnings about the user (3) Add important notes to ~/AgentWorkspace/daily/'$(date +%Y-%m-%d)'.md. This is your LAST CHANCE to persist context.'

~/bin/memory-search work --index 2>/dev/null; echo '[POST-COMPACTION] Context was just compacted. Re-read: (1) ~/AgentWorkspace/bot-state.md (2) ~/AgentWorkspace/user-profile.md (3) ~/AgentWorkspace/daily/'$(date +%Y-%m-%d)'.md to restore your working memory. Search past context with: memory-search work "query"'
